data.name: BtnOpenPortSerial.ToolTip
data.value: Open selected COM port with selected speed

data.name: tableLayoutPanel3.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="LblEthernetIP" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="LblEthernetPort" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="2" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="TbEthernetIP" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="TbEthernetPort" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="3" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Percent,10,Percent,40,Percent,20,Percent,30" /><Rows Styles="AutoSize,0" /></TableLayoutSettings>

data.name: btnGRBLCommand0.ToolTip
data.value: Help: Get list of all GRBL commands

data.name: tableLayoutPanel2.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="btnScanPort" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="3" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="cbPort" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="BtnOpenPortSerial" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="2" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="cbBaud" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Percent,25,Percent,25,Percent,25,Percent,25" /><Rows Styles="AutoSize,0" /></TableLayoutSettings>

data.name: cBStatus1.ToolTip
data.value: Show sent and processed commands during streaming

data.name: btnCheckGRBL.ToolTip
data.value: Check GRBL setup for maximum and minimum limits Not for GRBL Vers. < 1.0

data.name: cBStatus.ToolTip
data.value: Show the original received GRBL status reports

data.name: lblSrA.ToolTip
data.value: Accessory State S=spindle CW, C=spindle CCW, F=floot colant, M=mist coolant

data.name: lblSrLn.ToolTip
data.value: Line Number (needs to be enabled in config.h)

data.name: LblAccessoryState.ToolTip
data.value: Accessory State S=spindle CW, C=spindle CCW, F=floot colant, M=mist coolant

data.name: lblSrOv.ToolTip
data.value: Override Values for feed, rapids and speed in %

data.name: label13.ToolTip
data.value: Line Number (needs to be enabled in config.h)

data.name: label9.ToolTip
data.value: Override Values for feed, rapids and speed in %

data.name: lblSrPn.ToolTip
data.value: Input Pin State for XYZ, Probe, Door, Hold, soft-Reset, cycle-Start

data.name: label7.ToolTip
data.value: Input Pin State for XYZ, Probe, Door, Hold, soft-Reset, cycle-Start

data.name: label2.ToolTip
data.value: Buffer State (needs to be enabled via $10=2)

data.name: lblSrBf.ToolTip
data.value: Buffer State (needs to be enabled via $10=2)

data.name: btnGRBLHardReset.ToolTip
data.value: Try hard Reset via DTR / RTS Success depends on used hardware (DTR, RTS wired?)

data.name: tableLayoutPanel1.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="PanelEthernet" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="9" /><Control Name="btnGRBLCommand0" Row="5" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="PanelSeriell" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="9" /><Control Name="groupBox1" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="9" /><Control Name="btnGRBLCommand1" Row="5" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnGRBLCommand2" Row="5" RowSpan="1" Column="2" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnGRBLCmndParser" Row="5" RowSpan="1" Column="3" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnGRBLCmndBuild" Row="5" RowSpan="1" Column="4" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnGRBLHardReset" Row="5" RowSpan="1" Column="8" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="cBCommand" Row="4" RowSpan="1" Column="2" ColumnSpan="6" /><Control Name="btnGRBLCommand3" Row="5" RowSpan="1" Column="5" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnSend" Row="4" RowSpan="1" Column="8" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnGRBLCommand4" Row="5" RowSpan="1" Column="6" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnClear" Row="4" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="2" /><Control Name="btnGRBLReset" Row="5" RowSpan="1" Column="7" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="rtbLog" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="9" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Percent,10,Percent,10,Percent,10,Percent,10,Percent,10,Percent,10,Percent,10,Percent,17,Percent,13" /><Rows Styles="AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,Absolute,94,Percent,100,Absolute,28,Absolute,28" /></TableLayoutSettings>
